variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 7124 Engine Breather Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAO 7124 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 7124 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 7124 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: ENGINE BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 179.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 115.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 103.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 34.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 18.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 7.5 mm, No. Check Valves: 1
